title: From Pakse with Love
original_title: สะบายดี 2 ไม่มีคำตอบจาก..ปากเซ
overview: Por, the young director has failed in work and love. He's reluctant journey to Pakse in Laos, For hire wedding photography. There he was introduced Sonpaiwan, a Laos pretty woman. She was the inspiration for writing his new screenplay.
